item.title: Version 1.6.0
item.description:
What's New in Clip 1.6.0

  • Diff Tab (⌘6) — side-by-side text compare with line numbers, smart word/char highlighting, and per-pane copy
  • Reader Comments → AI Export — annotate markdown in the preview, export the file with inline instructions for an AI agent
  • Vietnamese Unicode Styling — accent and natural modes keep Vietnamese text readable when styling for social media
  • CLI Additions — clip style, unstyle, table, and comments subcommands
  • Faster and Safer — cached thumbnails, debounced vault saves, hardened previews and installer

item.title: Version 1.5.0
item.description:
What's New in Clip 1.5.0

  • Notes Tab — daily markdown editor with inline styling, keyword expansion, and preview
  • Floating Notes Panel — open with ⌥A for distraction-free writing alongside any app
  • Compact Icon Titlebar — tab icons inline with traffic lights, hover tooltips
  • Bundled CLI — clip command-line tool installs on first launch
  • Quick Look Extension — .clip vault files preview in Finder
